title: blocked.v1
description: Receipt payload recording a REFUSED action or grant: the guardrail fired and this is the signed evidence. Negative space made verifiable -- without it, 'the safety constraint was evaluated' is a narrative. Minted best-effort by the refusing gate (e.g. the approval irreversibility gate) and chained like any artifact; see docs/specs/memory-provenance-binding.md §2.6. Metadata only: evidence travels by reference or digest, never inline.

reason_class.description: Why the refusal fired. Closed vocabulary (AUD-06): an out-of-vocabulary reason must not pass validation.

approver.description: Approver URI of the refused grant, when the refusal was an approval mint.

actor.description: Actor URI of the refused action, when the refusal was an action.

irreversibility.description: Declared irreversibility class of the refused grant/action, when one was declared.

description.description: One-line human-readable refusal reason. Keep it short; detailed evidence travels by reference, not inline.

quarantine_receipt.description: Artifact id of the memory.quarantine-check.v1 receipt involved in the refusal (e.g. the DIRTY verdict), when one exists.

evidence_digest.description: sha256:<hex> digest of a private evidence object backing the refusal, when the producer keeps one.

reevaluate_when.description: Condition or RFC 3339 time after which the refused request may be re-attempted, when the block is conditional.
